children.name: 更新定时任务(Update a scheduled task)
更新设备属性(Update device attributes)
获取定时任务(Obtain scheduled tasks)
获取设备在线列表(Obtain the online list of devices)
关闭屏幕(Turn off the screen)
获取设备状态(Obtain device status)
开启屏幕(Turn on the screen)
更新计划任务(Update the scheduled task)
获取计划任务(Obtain the scheduled task)
获取设备属性(Obtain device attributes)

{

        <screen height="64" rotation="0" width="128"/>
    </out>
    <out xmlns="GetMulScreenSync" result="kSuccess">
        <enable value="false"/>
    </out>

        <server list="ntp.huidu.cn"/>

            <enable value="false"/>

            <channel value="0"/>

    </out>
    <out xmlns="GetSystemVolume" result="kSuccess">
        <mode value="default"/>
        <volume percent="80"/>
        <ploy>
            <item start="08:00:00" enable="true" percent="100"/>
            <item start="18:00:00" enable="true" percent="60"/>
            <item start="22:00:00" enable="true" percent="30"/>

    </out>
    <out xmlns="GetLuminancePloy" result="kSuccess">
